items.title: PR lifecycle
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  D["Draft PR opened"] --> CI1["CI runs"]
  CI1 -- green --> R["Mark ready for review"]
  R --> Rev["Reviewer reads + comments"]
  Rev -- changes requested --> Fix["Author pushes commits"]
  Fix --> CI2["CI re-runs"]
  CI2 -- green --> Rev
  Rev -- approved + CI green --> Merge["Merge button (squash/rebase/merge)"]
  Merge --> Del["Auto-delete branch"]
items.caption: The PR loop: open → CI → review → address → re-review → merge. Most platforms auto-delete the branch on merge.

items.title: Branch protection — policy enforced server-side
items.caption: Branch protection makes the merge button a gate, not a courtesy. The exact rules are per-team policy.
